treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Continue to wear the knee brace

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented to the emergency room with knee pain, chest pain, fever, and weakness.
Diagnosis of a small fracture in the right knee; advised to wear a knee brace.

patient_outcome.final_status: Discharged home with the ability to ambulate with assistance.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow-up with the orthopedic surgery team and primary physician.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Expected to recover with continued management of diabetes and follow-up care.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient reported no sign of infection and felt cared for by the team.
